note.en: Upgrading [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]]'s [[ability:na]] talent increases the damage of his plunge attack after using [[ability:skill]].
note.fr: Monter l'aptitude d'[[ability:na]] de [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] augmente les dégâts de son attaque plongeante après avoir utilisé le [[ability:skill]].
note.it: Alzare di livello l'[[ability:na]] di [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] aumenta i danni causati dall'Attacco in picchiata che segue la sua [[ability:skill]].
note.ru: Уровень [[ability:na|Обычной атаки]] влияет на урон атаки в падении во время [[ability:skill|Элементального навыка]].

notes.en: [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] generally does not need his talents leveled on an [[stat:em]] build.
notes.fr: [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] n'a généralement pas besoin de monter ses aptitudes sur un build [[stat:em]].
notes.it: Non è solitamente necessario alzare di livello i Talenti di [[character:kaedehara-kazuha]] con una build Maestria Elementale.
